product.title: 4 Days and 3 Nights Stay at an Orlando Vacation House

raw.productName: 4 Days and 3 Nights Stay at an Orlando Vacation House
raw.productSpecial:
• The Vacation House in Orlando is perfect for friends, family outings, company gatherings, and has a high cost-effectiveness. It is an excellent choice for a pleasant travel experience, relaxing your body and mind, and capturing the urban charm of Orlando!
  • The living rooms of the vacation house are spacious and bright, with luxurious and elegant decoration. Surrounded by lush green trees and surrounded by forests, the overall feeling is very comfortable.
  • All the facilities of the vacation house have been carefully considered and arranged, providing a modern kitchen, gym, washing machine, dryer, swimming pool, various entertainment facilities, multiple televisions, and other basic facilities such as high-speed network and air conditioning, ensuring that your accommodation is comfortable and you have a pleasant time.
  • When a family or group of friends stay in a vacation home, there will be a comfortable, fashionable, and private living space that allows you to relax and unwind.
  • The resort is close to the main theme parks and attractions in Orlando. It is the perfect base for your holiday in Orlando. In addition, it only takes a few minutes by car to reach supermarkets, pharmacies, and various dining venues. At the same time, there are also sufficient parking spaces outside the villa for your convenience.
Vacation House Regular Hotel
A fully equipped kitchen, including utensils, refrigerators, etc No kitchen
Large space, strong functionality, with a separate living room Small space, weak functionality, no separate living room
Complete living facilities: provide washing machines, dryers, terraces, etc Some hotels offer public laundry rooms
Unique private vacation house experience, living with family and friends in a vacation house feels more at home The rooms occupied are scattered and often arranged on different floors
Fully absorb the local architectural characteristics of Orlando and meet the diverse needs of customers Meeting the temporary accommodation needs of guests, with no unique features and consistency

 

    3 Bedrooms 4 Bedrooms 5 Bedrooms 6 Bedrooms 10 Bedrooms 15 Bedrooms
Three nights in Vacation House Value Season $329 per night $479 per night $579 per night $649 per night $999 per night $1399 per night
Peak Season $399 per night $549 per night $659 per night $739 per night $1129 per night $1699 per night
Special Notes

The above price includes tax + resort fee + one cleaning fee before check-out. If you need additional cleaning services during your stay, please contact Zongheng customer service for a quote.

2. Orlando Theme Park Round-trip Transfer Service: $180 per car for one day;

3. Tour Guide Accompanied Service for Entertainment Parks: Tour guide ticket+$450 per day;

4. One Day Tour: Kennedy Space Center 1-Day Tour or Mexico Gulf+Clearwater 1-Day Tour or Silver Springs 1-Day Tour;

5. Tickets for Theme Parks: Universal Studios, Disney and other theme parks. The price is needed to be confirmed with our customer service when you placing the order.

 

Guests who choose 3 bedrooms will be arranged for in a VAN of 7 people; guests who choose 4 bedrooms and above will be arranged with a flat top car up to 10 guests and 7-8 pieces of luggage.

decodedJson.description:
Today you will arrive at the Florida resort of Orlando, and we will provide Orlando International Airport (MCO) paid pick-up service ($160/one-way, three bedroom VAN is arranged for 7 people, and a flat roof is arranged for four bedrooms and above, can accommodate up to 10 guests and accommodate 7-8 pieces of luggage), the tour guide will introduce you to the use of indoor facilities, safety precautions for swimming pools, and more. Or you can go to the vacation house on your own.

Whether you’re a theme park enthusiast, bird watcher, foodie, water sports fanatic, sun worshipper, arts patron, serious shopper or anything in between, you’re always welcome here. The possibilities are endless. And wonder is always within reach. It’s the getaway you deserve — and you’ll only find it in Orlando. After heading to Vacation House, you will embark on a pleasant and enjoyable vacation journey.

dayList.section: Have Fun in the Vacation House OR Orlando 13 Theme Parks (Admission NOT Included) OR 2 Special 1-day Tours (Admission& Transportation Fee NOT Included)

decodedJson.description:
Today, you can enjoy the various facilities in the vacation house with your family and friends, swim in the swimming pool, go to the gym, cook a delicious meal in the kitchen, bathe in the sunshine of Florida, have an afternoon tea, taste delicious tea, enjoy the natural sunshine and breeze, chat and laugh with family and friends, or play games.

 

Guests can also take the shuttle ( three bedroom VAN is arranged for 7 people, and a flat roof is arranged for four bedrooms and above, can accommodate up to 10 guests and accommodate 7-8 pieces of luggage) to the parks from vacation house; if you join the special 1-day tour, a tour leader will pick you up from the hotel and take you back by the evening.

If you need our company to help you book theme park tickets, please choose the park you want to go to and pay when you book the tour (the ticket information is subject to the final answer of the customer service). The ticket price is based on the window price of the theme park. Once booked, it cannot be canceled or changed.

If you bring your own tickets, please take care of the transportation from the hotel to the theme park.

 

Theme Parks List

Disney's Magic Kingdom Disney's Epcot Center Disney's Hollywood Studios Disney's Animal Kingdom
Universal Studios Universal's Islands of Adventure Universal's Volcano Bay SeaWorld Orlando
Disney's Typhoon Lagoon OR Blizzard Water Park LEGOLAND Theme Park Orlando LEGOLAND Water Park Aquatica Water Park Orlando

 

3 Special 1-day Tour

Kennedy Space Center 1-day Tour (Wed, Fri, Sun departure, minimum 2 people)
Gulf of Mexico Tour 1-day Tour (Only Thursday departure, minimum 2 people)
Silver Springs with Glass-bottom Boat and Kayak Boats 1-day-Tour (Tue/Thu departure, minimum 2 people)

html.primary:
1. Itinerary Cancellation Policy:

Prior to departure Penalty charge (% of total tour fee)
Less than 18 days prior to departure date (EST)  100%
Less than 30 days but 19 days prior to departure date (EST) 50%
 Less than 59 days but 31 days prior to departure date (EST) 30%
60 days prior to departure date (EST) 0

 

2. If the weather condition, war, general strikes, and other unforeseen circumstances interrupt the journey, our company reserves the right to rearrange the journey without refunding the tour fee.

3. If the guest quit during the trip or fails to participate in any itinerary due to personal reasons (no travel documents, late arrival, illness, accident, etc.), the paid tour fare will not be refunded, and no other services will be compensated.

Know Before You Book:

1. Customer under 18 years old MUST be accompanied by at least one adult. A guardian traveling with children must provide proof of custody or notarized parental authorization for travel. In consideration of the guest safety, pregnant women are only allowed to join the tour if pregnant for 24 weeks or less by the end of the trip.

2. Please be sure to provide accurate and complete information upon booking. This includes name, gender, valid documents (passport, visa etc.), valid contact information (preferably a mobile phone), accurate flight information, tour location, etc., This helps to avoid any errors upon the reservation because errors affect travel. Any losses due to inaccurate or invalid information will be at your own cost and the company will not be held responsible.

3. Hotels have different room types, such as a King/Queen size beds or two double size twin beds. The maximum number of people who can legally stay in a room is 2 to 4 people. In addition, each hotel has a different method of charging the deposit, which requires the cooperation of the guests according to regulations. Please be noticed that most of the deposit collection and refund is handled by credit card. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday guarantee the number of rooms for guests but does not guarantee the specific room type and location. Hotel check-in time is usually after 15:00.

4. Normal health conditions are required to participate and enjoy our full itineraries. Contact us for specific policies or information regarding passengers with disabilities and the handicapped who do need to provide advance notification to make a reservation. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday do not guarantee a wheelchair lift-equipped bus and/or seating availability to disabled passengers without prior notification and approval.

5. Guests are required to bring their own relevant documents and materials required for entry or cross-border travel. Whether they can enter or leave the country is subject to the decision of the customs of each country. The inability to enter the country is a force majeure factor, and the paid tour fee will not be refunded.

6. English driver included. Guide service will not be included.

While JUPITER LEGEND Corporation makes every effort to provide on-time service, it does not guarantee to arrive at or depart from any point.as a specific time, which may be affected by any number of factors including weather, traffic, strikes, government shutdowns, war or terrorist attacks, or mechanical prob- lems. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation is not liable for any inconvenience or expense caused as a result of such a delay, not liable for the expense of connecting air or train or bus service missed as a result of a delay and not liable for any other travel expense caused as a result of a delay.

3. Smoking is prohibited aboard the bus in accordance with Federal law and prohibited in most hotel rooms. Customers are responsible for any penalty charged by the hotel in a non-smoking room at least $250 per night. All Cancun hotels are responsible for the environmental tax to be paid by the guest.

4.  Luggage is subject to inspection when crossing international borders. You will be asked to declare any items subject to duty upon crossing the border. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday are not responsible for any luggage crossing international borders. Passengers must claim all luggage at the border crossing point before proceeding. No luggage is allowed across the border unless claimed by a passenger. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday will not provide free transportation to a passenger denied entry across an international border.

shopify_mapping.title: 4 Days and 3 Nights Stay at an Orlando Vacation House
shopify_mapping.bodyHtml:
Highlights

  • The Vacation House in Orlando is perfect for friends, family outings, company gatherings, and has a high cost-effectiveness. It is an excellent choice for a pleasant travel experience, relaxing your body and mind, and capturing the urban charm of Orlando!
  • The living rooms of the vacation house are spacious and bright, with luxurious and elegant decoration. Surrounded by lush green trees and surrounded by forests, the overall feeling is very comfortable.
  • All the facilities of the vacation house have been carefully considered and arranged, providing a modern kitchen, gym, washing machine, dryer, swimming pool, various entertainment facilities, multiple televisions, and other basic facilities such as high-speed network and air conditioning, ensuring that your accommodation is comfortable and you have a pleasant time.
  • When a family or group of friends stay in a vacation home, there will be a comfortable, fashionable, and private living space that allows you to relax and unwind.
  • The resort is close to the main theme parks and attractions in Orlando. It is the perfect base for your holiday in Orlando. In addition, it only takes a few minutes by car to reach supermarkets, pharmacies, and various dining venues. At the same time, there are also sufficient parking spaces outside the villa for your convenience.
Vacation House Regular Hotel
A fully equipped kitchen, including utensils, refrigerators, etc No kitchen
Large space, strong functionality, with a separate living room Small space, weak functionality, no separate living room
Complete living facilities: provide washing machines, dryers, terraces, etc Some hotels offer public laundry rooms
Unique private vacation house experience, living with family and friends in a vacation house feels more at home The rooms occupied are scattered and often arranged on different floors
Fully absorb the local architectural characteristics of Orlando and meet the diverse needs of customers Meeting the temporary accommodation needs of guests, with no unique features and consistency

Three nights in Vacation House Value Season $329 per night $479 per night $579 per night $649 per night $999 per night $1399 per night

Special Notes

The above price includes tax + resort fee + one cleaning fee before check-out. If you need additional cleaning services during your stay, please contact Zongheng customer service for a quote.

noticeInfo.vluesTip1:
Know Before You Book:

1. Customer under 18 years old MUST be accompanied by at least one adult. A guardian traveling with children must provide proof of custody or notarized parental authorization for travel. In consideration of the guest safety, pregnant women are only allowed to join the tour if pregnant for 24 weeks or less by the end of the trip.

2. Please be sure to provide accurate and complete information upon booking. This includes name, gender, valid documents (passport, visa etc.), valid contact information (preferably a mobile phone), accurate flight information, tour location, etc., This helps to avoid any errors upon the reservation because errors affect travel. Any losses due to inaccurate or invalid information will be at your own cost and the company will not be held responsible.

3. Hotels have different room types, such as a King/Queen size beds or two double size twin beds. The maximum number of people who can legally stay in a room is 2 to 4 people. In addition, each hotel has a different method of charging the deposit, which requires the cooperation of the guests according to regulations. Please be noticed that most of the deposit collection and refund is handled by credit card. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday guarantee the number of rooms for guests but does not guarantee the specific room type and location. Hotel check-in time is usually after 15:00.

4. Normal health conditions are required to participate and enjoy our full itineraries. Contact us for specific policies or information regarding passengers with disabilities and the handicapped who do need to provide advance notification to make a reservation. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday do not guarantee a wheelchair lift-equipped bus and/or seating availability to disabled passengers without prior notification and approval.

5. Guests are required to bring their own relevant documents and materials required for entry or cross-border travel. Whether they can enter or leave the country is subject to the decision of the customs of each country. The inability to enter the country is a force majeure factor, and the paid tour fee will not be refunded.

6. English driver included. Guide service will not be included.

 

Know Before You Go:

1. The maximal waiting time for any late passengers is 10 minutes beyond the meeting time announced by the Tour Guide. While JUPITER LEGEND Corporation makes every effort to provide on-time service, it does not guarantee to arrive at or depart from any point.as a specific time, which may be affected by any number of factors including weather, traffic, strikes, government shutdowns, war or terrorist attacks, or mechanical prob- lems. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation is not liable for any inconvenience or expense caused as a result of such a delay, not liable for the expense of connecting air or train or bus service missed as a result of a delay and not liable for any other travel expense caused as a result of a delay.

2. The following documents are recommended to make your check-in process smooth: A valid photo ID is required to board the bus; We recommend you bring a copy of the email confirmation to board the bus.

3. Smoking is prohibited aboard the bus in accordance with Federal law and prohibited in most hotel rooms. Customers are responsible for any penalty charged by the hotel in a non-smoking room at least $250 per night. All Cancun hotels are responsible for the environmental tax to be paid by the guest.

4.  Luggage is subject to inspection when crossing international borders. You will be asked to declare any items subject to duty upon crossing the border. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday are not responsible for any luggage crossing international borders. Passengers must claim all luggage at the border crossing point before proceeding. No luggage is allowed across the border unless claimed by a passenger. JUPITER LEGEND Corporation and Ctour Holiday will not provide free transportation to a passenger denied entry across an international border.

5. Only for products with airport pick-up service: only one pick-up service within the free pick-up time range is provided for each order. If it is impossible to arrange due to weather and flight delay, etc., please pay for your own transportation costs.

6. Emergency contact: (Toll Free) +1(866)585-8747.
